live_matches.match_title: Gokulam Kerala FC vs Aizawl FC - 5 May 2026
live_matches.description: Gokulam Kerala FC face Aizawl FC in a crucial relegation phase encounter, with both teams determined to secure valuable points. The outcome could play a big role in shaping their survival hopes this season. Tune in to catch all the action from Star Cement Indian Football League 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
